metadata.notes: Static fullscreen sphere, multi-pass per measurement, timed via GPU timestamp queries when available (timingMethod) with a wall-clock fence fallback. Each shader is measured at N and 2N passes per batch (stats.passesLo/passesHi); per-pass cost = (median(total@2N) − median(total@N)) / N so fixed per-batch overhead cancels. stats.msPerPass is authoritative; stats.medianFt is the hi-level per-pass median (diagnostic).
